title: Organic Baby Bio Liquid Houseplant Food Concentrated Nitrogen Feed 175ml
features: HEALTHY PLANTS: Gives your houseplants a healthier look, with lush green leaves and vibrantly coloured flowers
EASY TO USE: Simply add 5-10 drops to 1/2 litre of water, then gently pour onto your plant's soil
BALANCED FORMULA: Balanced formula that gives your houseplants everything they need for bigger, brighter blooms and healthy roots
INDOOR USE: Suitable for all houseplants in your home
NOTE: This product does not have an expiry date, the date on the product is the manufacturing date
description: From the manufacturer TRUSTED NUTRITION FOR THRIVING, VIBRANT INDOOR PLANTS HIGH CONCENTRATION A concentrated formula—175ml makes up to 70L of plant-nourishing solution, delivering incredible value and care for your houseplants. ADDED SEAWEED EXTRACT Enriched with seaweed extract, Baby Bio Organic Houseplant Food enhances plant health and builds resilience against common plant threats. Along with its unique NPK formulation, the added seaweed helps strengthen plants’ immune systems ensuring healthier, more resilient plants that thrive. UNIVERSAL SOLUTION Baby Bio has been feeding all houseplant types for over 70 years, from lush greens to delicate orchids, this unique fertiliser ensures balanced nutrition and lasting beauty. Growing Greatness With Every Drop The UK’s number 1 houseplant plant care brand, Baby Bio has been feeding Britain’s houseplants for over 70 years. Our extensive product range has been expertly formulated with essential nutrients for healthier, brighter and more beautiful houseplants. From our original to specialist feeds, Leaf Shine and Bug Killer, Baby Bio has everything you need to make your houseplants thrive and bring your indoor spaces to life.
